Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Daji]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Daji is Kiro's little brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — Daji is the younger brother of Kiro and son of King Dakata.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Daji uses armor given to him by his father that Enforces him without costing madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Daji's armor has a Ruler construct that launches stone missiles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Daji carries swords in both hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Daji was able to act freely while Mercy's sacred arts were sealed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Daji is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Daji uses Striker bindings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Daji uses a left-hand sword and a shield from his soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Daji can fire a beam of blue lightning from his sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Daji was carried in an owl.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Daji is a person who will kill Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Daji is a wolf-like young man and the younger brother to Prince Kiro.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Daji uses Striker attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Daji's madra is bright and crackling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Daji glared at Mercy and Pride.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Daji is Seishen Daji.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Daji is a member of the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy took a teleportation anchor from Daji.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Daji's madra channels are scarred as if they had been torn apart and stitched together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Daji's blood essence is weaker than it should be for an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Daji is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Daji is a prince.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Daji once plotted against a Monarch's children.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Daji's father's perception hovers over his soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Daji is described as lean and strong with wild hair and a sharp face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Daji is described as a construct wearing human skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Daji guarded Kiro.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
